Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}We go to the same school, right? One look at your uniform's all I need to know![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Umm, I'm kind of embarrassed to ask you this right off the bat, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Would you mind not standing so close to me!? You're too thin and too cool![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}If people start thinking we're best friends or something, I'm gonna end up as "the uncool one"![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}There you are. I thought your voice sounded familiar.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}You know what I'm here for. Now hand it over.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}H-Hey! Y-You! Call the fire truck— Er, I mean the, uh... Uh...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Whoa, hey... I thought we were buddies, weren't we? C'mon, pal![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}Quit making a scene, all right? People are looking at me funny.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}I've got some business to take care of now, but you... You're Nozomi Suemitsu-kun, aren't you? I did my homework, see.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}You know I'm not letting you off that easy, right? I suggest you reconsider things.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}That was horrifying! My poor heart! I think it dropped into my coin purse for a minute there![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}By the way! May I just say that you have a wonderfully big heart for someone so slim?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Suemitsu gave me a hearty thanks.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I've become acquainted with[n]Nozomi Suemitsu, the Gourmet King.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Whew, all that drama made me hungry. My stomach is definitely not amused.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}You wanna tag along, friend? Shall I treat you to the finest dining? If so, you've come to the right place...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}For I am the king—the Gourmet King![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}That's right! Gourmet King 2009! ...Or was it 2010? Eh, whatever.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}And as the king, I know all the kingliest places for... Ugh... Urrgh!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 5 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Wha—!? My... My tummy...! It's in horrible pain! I think it's an... e-emergency...![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 5 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Sorry, but I'll treat you... another time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It started getting dark, so I went home.[n]{f 1 1}
